change_comments.message:
sdc-cs job failed:
```
+ res=2
+ [ 2 -gt 0 ]
+ date
Thu Feb 13 12:44:36 UTC 2025 --- dox keyspace was created
+ echo Thu Feb 13 12:44:36 UTC 2025 --- dox keyspace was created
/bin/sh: 15: cd: can't cd to /tmp/writable-config/tools/build/scripts
sh: 0: Can't open /tmp/writable-config/tools/build/scripts/onboard-db-schema-creation.sh
sed: can't read /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts/schemaCreation.sh: No such file or directory
sed: can't read /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts/janusGraphSchemaCreation.sh: No such file or directory

Running create_dox_db.cql

chmod: cannot access '/tmp/writable-config/tools/build/scripts/create_dox_db.cql': No such file or directory

+ sleep 10
Running alter_dox_db.cql

chmod: cannot access '/tmp/writable-config/tools/build/scripts/alter_dox_db.cql': No such file or directory
+ cqlsh -u asdc_user -p Aa1234%^! cassandra-dc1-service.onap.svc.cluster.local 9042 --cqlversion=3.4.6 -f /tmp/writable-config/tools/build/scripts/alter_dox_db.cql
sh: 0: Can't open /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts/schemaCreation.sh
sh: 0: Can't open /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts/janusGraphSchemaCreation.sh
+ working_directory=/tmp

+ cut -d. -f1-3
+ cut -d- -f1

+ printf \033[33mcl_release=[1.14.0]\033[0m\n

cl_release=[1.14.0]
+ tosca_dir=/tmp/writable-config/sdctool/tosca
+ grep toscaConformanceLevel: /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/config/configuration.yaml
+ awk {print $2}
grep: /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/config/configuration.yaml: Not a directory
+ cl_version=
+ cd /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts
/tmp/writable-config/importconformance.sh: 16: cd: can't cd to /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts
+ chmod +x sdcSchemaFileImport.sh
execute /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/scripts/sdcSchemaFileImport.sh /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/tosca 1.14.0  /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/config onap
chmod: cannot access 'sdcSchemaFileImport.sh': No such file or directory

+ ./sdcSchemaFileImport.sh /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/tosca 1.14.0 /tmp/writable-config/sdctool/config onap
/tmp/writable-config/importconformance.sh: 20: /tmp/writable-config/importconformance.sh: ./sdcSchemaFileImport.sh: not found
```

Chart is not deployed:
```
root@control01-daily-master-sm:/# helm -n onap status onap-sdc --show-desc
NAME: onap-sdc
LAST DEPLOYED: Tue Feb 18 09:50:50 2025
NAMESPACE: onap
STATUS: failed
REVISION: 1
DESCRIPTION: Release "onap-sdc" failed: 1 error occurred:
        * Deployment.apps "onap-sdc-fe" is invalid: spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[14].name: Not found: "onap-sdc-fe-jetty-logs"

```

SDC-CS has issues (multiple avicted pods) and further problems:
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating/140196-8/

inline_comments.message: We shouldn't be using RollingFileAppenders anymore. Sooner or later the `emptyDir` volumes that we defined will fill up. Instead we should use `ConsoleAppenders`
